name: Streaming Agent Card
summary: Displays the AI agent's streaming response with real-time text and tool execution updates
goals: Render streaming AI responses in real-time as chunks arrive
Show tool execution progress during agent processing

specDetail.description: A component that renders the AI agent's streaming response in real-time. Displays text as it arrives via SSE, shows tool execution cards as they start and complete, and provides visual feedback for the overall agent progress.

parameters.name: streamState
parameters.description: Current streaming state including text buffer, active tools, and status

parameters.name: isStreaming
parameters.description: Whether the stream is currently active

constraints: Must render new text chunks within 100ms of arrival
Must show a pulsing cursor or typing indicator during streaming
Must handle stream interruption gracefully without content loss

acceptanceCriteria.given: an agent is processing a request
acceptanceCriteria.then: the response text is rendered in real-time with a visible cursor

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
